name: MNCA
description: Deep feedback — CA mitosis drives the accumulator
code:
// Deep feedback — CA mitosis drives the accumulator
caStream('mnca_mitosis').out(o1)

noise(1.5, 0.015).rotate(()=>time*0.008)
  .color(0.45, 0.25, 0.6)
  .modulateScale(src(o1), 0.06)
  .add(solid(0.08, 0.05, 0.14), 0.4)
  .brightness(0.12)
  .saturate(1.3)
  .out(o2)

src(o1)
  .color(0.7, 0.5, 0.9)
  .brightness(0.15)
  .contrast(1.4)
  .layer(src(o2).mult(solid(1,1,1), 0.6))
  .out(o3)

src(o0)
  .scrollX(()=>Math.sin(time*0.02)*0.001)
  .scrollY(()=>Math.cos(time*0.017)*0.0008)
  .modulateRotate(src(o1), 0.015)
  .blend(src(o2), 0.45)
  .modulateScale(noise(1.5, 0.025), 0.005)
  .hue(()=>0.004)
  .luma(0.003, 0.04)
  .brightness(0.03)
  .saturate(1.25)
  .contrast(1.05)
  .add(src(o1).color(0.6, 0.4, 0.85).brightness(0.1).contrast(1.5), 0.5)
  .out(o0)
